message:
feat(syscall): add fchmod/fchown/umask/truncate/ftruncate/flock/linkat/getcwd/get*id wrappers

Add raw syscall wrappers for additional file and process operations:
- fchmod, fchown (fd-based mode/ownership)
- umask (file creation mask)
- truncate, ftruncate (file size)
- flock (advisory locking)
- linkat (hard links)
- getcwd (working directory)
- getppid, getuid, geteuid, getgid, getegid (process IDs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
